name: Bildr
description: Bildr — Visual no-code web app builder with a JavaScript-extensible component system and API connections.

seo.title: Bildr — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Bildr: Bildr — Visual no-code web app builder with a JavaScript-extensible component system and API connections.

when_to_use: Visual no-code web app with custom JavaScript extensions
API-connected SaaS MVP built without a backend developer
Internal admin tool with REST API data sources
Database-driven directory app with user authentication
Multi-step form app with conditional logic and integrations

pros: More flexible than Webflow for apps
cons: Learning curve feels more like coding
Smaller ecosystem than Bubble or Webflow
review.verdict: A middle ground between Bubble and actual code — powerful but with its own idiosyncratic model.
review.best_for: Builders comfortable with JS who want deeper control than Bubble offers
review.not_for: Pure no-coders or teams needing enterprise SLAs and support
